verdicts.reasoning: The description accurately reflects the services provided by Stripe as stated on their homepage.
The authentication methods listed are supported by the documentation, which details the use of API keys and Basic Auth.

The availability of public documentation and the ability to self-serve API keys confirm that developers can build integrations immediately.
